SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-14-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NEVILLE WRIGHT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAIATE BOUAJAJI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $150. SERVED NOV-05-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOUAJAJI, HAIATE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF NEVILLE WRIGHT AND DEFENDANT HAIATE BOUAJAJI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERKS: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NEVILLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOUAJAJI, HAIATE RETURN HER (D'S) VEHICLE TO HER AND ALLOW ACCESS TO YOUR (P'S) GARAGE TO RETRIEVE THE VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2024 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-05-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NEVILLE WRIGHT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAIATE BOUAJAJI IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT SERVED TIMELY. DEFENDANT WOULD NOT WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-24-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NEVILLE WRIGHT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAIATE BOUAJAJI IS PRESENT. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO CHECK STATUS OF REMOVAL OF AUTOMOBILE FROM THE PLAINTIFF'S GARAGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
